hero.title: Connect every point of your
hero.subtitle: The only platform that integrates WMS, TMS, Smart Routing and Palletizing with AI. Cut costs, eliminate rejections and get full real-time visibility.

problem.title: Your logistics has leaks you
points: 91% of trucks leave with unused space.
Routes are planned manually.
Rejections surface when it's already too late.
Every system speaks a different language.

platform.title: One platform.
platform.description: Geodot integrates warehouse, transport, routing and palletizing into a single AI platform.

cta.title: Ready to connect your logistics?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you Geodot with your own data.

wms.name: WMS
wms.title: Warehouse Management
wms.subtitle: Geodot WMS goes beyond traditional ERPs. Full traceability down to the last pack, automatic FIFO/FEFO and AI-driven picking optimization.

problem.title: Your warehouse hides costly inefficiencies
points: Expired product: you find out goods have expired when it's already too late.
Slow picking: operators walk the warehouse without an optimized route.
Phantom stock: the system says one thing, reality another.
Customer rejections: you ship product with little remaining shelf life.
No traceability: you don't know which lot you delivered to each customer.

solution.title: A WMS that sees what other systems can't

steps.title: Smart locations
steps.description: Multi-level structure with 3D visualization. The system suggests where to store each product based on its constraints.

steps.title: Full traceability
steps.description: By lot, expiration date and label. Immutable history of every movement for audit and compliance.

steps.title: Automatic FIFO/FEFO
steps.description: Configurable rules and per-customer shelf life. Blocks shipping of soon-to-expire product before it becomes a problem.

steps.title: Optimized picking
steps.description: The same routing engine applied inside the warehouse. AI overnight reorganization and step-by-step guides for operators.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your warehouse?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you the WMS with your own SKUs.

tms.name: TMS
tms.tagline: Your fleet under control, owned or outsourced
tms.title: Transport Management
tms.subtitle: Manage your entire transport operation from a single platform. Live tracking, up-to-date documentation and optimized costs for owned and outsourced fleets.

problem.title: Transport is your biggest cost and your biggest blind spot
points: No visibility: you don't know where your trucks are in real time.
Uncontrolled third parties: carriers operating however they want.
Expired paperwork: permits and licenses that lapse without warning.
Opaque costs: you can't attribute costs to routes or customers.
Manual coordination: phone calls and WhatsApp to keep everyone aligned.

solution.title: Full control of your transport operation

steps.title: Live tracking
steps.description: Continuous GPS position by position, geofences and automatic measurement of time spent at each customer.

steps.title: Unified fleet
steps.description: Owned and outsourced in the same view. Carrier portal with approval workflows and shared visibility.

steps.title: Documents and maintenance
steps.description: Expiration alerts for permits, licenses and insurance. Preventive maintenance by mileage or time.

steps.title: Automatic settlement
steps.description: Calculation by kilometer, delivery or mixed. Fuel control and accounting export ready for payment.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your transport?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify your owned and outsourced fleet in a single view.

paletizado.name: Smart Palletizing
paletizado.title: Smart
paletizado.subtitle: The only system that calculates palletizing in real time while it routes. It knows exactly what fits in each truck before it leaves.

problem.title: 15% of your trucks travel empty
points: Safety margin: you load to 85% "just in case" it won't fit.
Rules in someone's head: the expert palletizer knows, but the system doesn't.
In-transit damage: poorly stacked products that arrive damaged.
Slow picking: operators with no clear guide on how to build each pallet.
Load rejections: the customer receives crushed product.

steps.title: 300+ parameters
steps.description: Dimensions, weight, stackability, fragility, temperature and compatibility of every product in each calculation.

steps.title: Smart rules
steps.description: Stacking by product, family, customer, fragility and legal axle weight. The expert's knowledge, encoded in the system.

steps.title: Simultaneous recalculation
steps.description: Every time you add an order to a route, the system recalculates whether it really fits and alerts before it becomes a problem.

steps.title: Visual build guides
steps.description: Which product goes in each layer and position, with step-by-step sequence and operator validation.

cta.title: How many extra trucks are you sending?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll calculate your savings with palletizing simultaneous to routing.

torreControl.name: Control Tower
torreControl.title: Control Tower
torreControl.subtitle: Command center to monitor, analyze and act on your entire supply chain. From the warehouse to the last delivery.

problem.title: You operate blind until it's too late
points: Fragmented information: each system has its own view.
Late reaction: you find out about problems once they've already hit.
No clear metrics: you don't know what's working and what isn't.
Manual reports: hours compiling Excel for management.
Customers in the dark: they can't see the status of their orders.

steps.title: Live dashboard
steps.description: Operations map with every truck, delivery status, active alerts and daily KPIs compared against the average.

steps.title: Proactive alerts
steps.description: Configurable and escalating. Stopped truck, customer delay, late route or compromised cold chain, via dashboard, email, WhatsApp or SMS.

steps.title: Predictive AI
steps.description: Predicts delays before they happen, detects anomalies and suggests optimizations that learn from every delivery.

steps.title: Customer portal
steps.description: Customers see where their delivery is, live ETA, history and documents. Automatic daily, weekly and monthly reports.

cta.title: How much is operating without visibility costing you?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify WMS, TMS, Routing and Palletizing in a single board.
